programme.desc: Otto John charges Toni with finding out who is supporting Scipio financially. She finds what she is looking for in her father's office and comes across dubious payments. programme.title: Matched
programme.sub-title: Virginia And Lopeti + Manpreet And Manpreet
programme.desc: Princess Virginia prepares to marry Lopeti in the grandest Tongan wedding ever to be held in New Zealand but how will Her Royal Highness cope with marriage when she has never cooked or cleaned in her life? And Kiwi-Sikh Manpreet travels back to India for his arranged wedding to a woman with his same name but will they have anything else in common?

programme.title: Spectacular Railways Of The Swiss Alps
programme.desc: The Rigi is home to the most remarkable collection of historic mountain railways in Switzerland, led by the Rigi Railway, the first cogwheel train ever built in Europe. A journey aboard the legendary Sachsi railcar is a step back in time, winding past waterfalls, rugged rock faces and soaring viaducts, to the delight of passengers and railway enthusiasts alike. Some traditions are worth preserving.

programme.title: Scottish Vets Down Under
programme.desc: At Bendigo Animal Hospital, Dr Chris faces one of his most unusual cases yet when a pregnant carpet python needs urgent intervention. It's a painstaking procedure with little room for error. At the equine hospital, Dr Mike and Dr Sarah each deal with horses showing signs of lameness, but what appears routine quickly becomes far more serious, putting both surgical skill and nerves firmly to the test.

programme.title: Scottish Vets Down Under
programme.desc: It's a busy day in Bendigo. At the equine hospital, a horse arrives with a worrying knee injury before a critically ill newborn foal is rushed in, pushing the team to their limits. At the animal hospital, Dr Chris treats a possum struggling to recover, then heads out during peak kitten season. Back at the equine hospital, the battle to save the foal and reunite it with its mother is just beginning.

programme.desc: The latest news from the oldest living culture, join Natalie Ahmat and the team of NITV journalists for stories from an Indigenous perspective.

programme.sub-title: Sri Lanka With Alexander Armstrong Series 1 Ep 3
programme.desc: Alexander meets a snake expert called Sampath who is always on call to rescue the deadly but endangered reptiles. After a meeting with a well-known Sri Lankan travel writer, Shenelle, at the beautiful coast near Galle, he drives to the far north of the country to the scene of a bitter civil war which raged for thirty years.

programme.title: A New Anzac
programme.desc: Three Months of preparation lead up to the first Remembrance Day ceremony held on the new Parade Ground, with the prestigious Victoria Cross being awarded to Private Richard Leslie Norden. Objects big and small are prepped for the new Anzac Hall, including the FA-18 Hornet, the never before displayed German V2 rocket, and a collection of over 80 new mannequins. The architectural wonder of the Rising Sun copper roof comes together as the team work towards their end of year deadline.

programme.title: Orient Express: A Golden Era Of Travel
programme.desc: In the Golden Age of Rail, passengers could buy a ticket from London to Istanbul on the Orient Express network. Travelling east through Austria, they might stop in its capital to meet the father of psychoanalysis, whose own flight to freedom is forever linked to the legendary train. Then on to the City of Spas, home to one of the world's longest and fastest tram lines, run entirely by children.

programme.title: The King
programme.desc: Bruno infiltrates Farid into the Muslim community led by the charismatic imam Amir. Sonia, a young prison officer, always critical of Bruno’s methods, becomes the new commander: the clean face of San Michele to show to Lombardo. With the death of Lackovic, the junky inmates start going into cold turkey: a feud begins between the Slavs and Nigerians to control the drug trafficking.

programme.title: Babylon Berlin
programme.desc: As an SA squad marches through town, Charlotte is called to a crime scene, Nyssen throws a huge party with Helga and makes an important announcement.

programme.desc: Fiction becomes reality as Zelensky is confirmed as president. programme.title: The Bee Whisperer
programme.desc: Charlie is a pro when it comes to bee removal. But the one technique he can never seem to nail down is the "forced abscond". To level up his forced abscond game, Charlie heads to Brenham, Texas to meet with the "Texas Friendly Beekeeper" and forced abscond master. Charlie then meets with Korhan Kaftanoglu from Apimaye - a company that specialises in a new type of insulated bee hive.

programme.title: Wales: Land Of The Wild
programme.desc: It's the middle of spring and the brightest time of year in Wales. This should be the best of times for wildlife, but the race to breed is on and predators are on the hunt.

programme.title: The Rover Of Tobruk
programme.desc: The Rover of Tobruk is a compelling documentary that examines the amazing life story of WW2 Military Medal recipient and two times Magarey Medallist and Port Adelaide Football Club immortal Bob Quinn.

programme.title: Fallen: A Tragic Story Of The Unnamed
programme.desc: This story tells the heartbreaking story of Norman Gibbins. Despite facing challenges and strained relationships, Norman enlisted and rose through the ranks. He fought in Gallipoli, where he exhibited bravery and leadership. However, he tragically lost his life at the Battle of Fromelles. The aftermath of the battle caused deep grief and conflict within Norman's family, particularly affecting his sister Violet. Nevertheless, his heroism and leadership will never be forgotten. It is a moving picture of the grief that over 60,000 families experienced as a result of the deaths of their loved ones during WW1.

programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.desc: All the best moments from the 2026 Amstel Gold Men's race, as the peloton takes on a 257.4 km route through the Netherlands, starting in Maastricht and finishing in Berg en Terblijt.

programme.title: Stories From The Cities
programme.desc: Stories from the Cities journeys across Canada, Mexico, and the United States, exploring the host cities of the FIFA World Cup 2026. In this episode, we discover the footballing spirit of Houston through its people, neighbourhoods, culture, and the everyday moments that define the city.

programme.title: Amstel Gold Women's Race 2026
programme.desc: All the best moments from the 2026 Amstel Gold Women's race, as the peloton takes on a 158 km route through the Netherlands, starting in Maastricht and finishing in Berg en Terblijt.

programme.title: Marathon De Paris 2026
programme.desc: All the best moments from the 2026 edition of the Schneider Electric Paris Marathon.

programme.title: Surviving Ww2
programme.desc: Air warfare was pivotal yet perilous in WW2. Eric Brown, history's most prolific test pilot, recalls the deadly arms race to match Germany's superior technology. Dambuster George Johnson recounts dropping the bouncing bomb on a German dam. Glider pilot Laurie Weeden flew into Normandy the night before D-Day, whilst USAF pilot Huie Lamb survived ditching his P-51 Mustang in the English Channel.

programme.title: SBS World News
programme.desc: Latest reports and analysis of major national and international news of the day from Australia's only world news service.

programme.title: Jewels Of The Mediterranean
programme.desc: In this episode, we visit Menorca, the most easterly point of Spain. Luxury boat business Pedro's Boats gives an insight into life and business on the isle, a British couple show us their local fiesta, and we explore Lithica, a very unique arts venue.

programme.title: Magical Train Journeys In Switzerland
programme.sub-title: From The Three-lakes Region Through Lavaux To Geneva
programme.desc: From the land of the three lakes, the train travels south through idyllic Lavaux, Switzerland's best-known wine region, to the international metropolis of Geneva. This trip is all about water and wine.

programme.title: Jersey And Guernsey
programme.desc: It's Liberation Day across the islands, and celebrations are underway to celebrate the anniversary of their liberation from Nazi occupation. Meet the people who tireless prepare for this important day.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots
programme.sub-title: No Laughing Matter: Seth Meyers, Tig Notaro, Sarah Silverman
programme.desc: Henry Louis Gates, Jr. shows comedians Seth Meyers, Tig Notaro and Sarah Silverman that their family trees are filled with people whose struggles laid the groundwork for their success. Gates also reveals to each one news of an unexpected DNA cousin.

programme.title: Snowpiercer
programme.desc: As the Big Alice crew are granted shore leave on Snowpiercer, Layton (Daveed Diggs) and Wilford (Sean Bean) have differing opinions on the future.

programme.title: The Boy In The Striped Pajamas
programme.desc: Through the innocent eyes of Bruno, the son of the commandant at a German concentration camp, a friendship with a Jewish boy on the other side of the fence has startling and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: A Sasquatch family roams the forests of Northern California for a year, navigating nature, survival, and encroaching human presence in this surreal, dialogue-free tale.

programme.title: Speed Kills
programme.desc: A wealthy speedboat racer leads a double life that gets him into trouble with the law and drug lords. Directed by Jodi Scurfield, starring John Travolta, Katheryn Winnick, Jennifer Esposito.

programme.title: Discovering Film: Whoopi Goldberg
programme.desc: Some of the biggest film stars in history rose to fame during the `golden age' of Hollywood, in the early and mid-20th century. We profile some of these stars who became household names.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: An aged, retired Sherlock Holmes deals with early dementia as he tries to remember both his final case and a mysterious woman whose memory haunts him. He also befriends a fan, the young son of his housekeeper, who wants him to work again. Directed by Bill Condon and stars Ian McKellen, Laura Linney and Hiroyuki Sanada.

programme.title: The Battle Of The River Plate
programme.desc: A gripping tale of heroism at sea, where the British Navy chases a German battleship sinking Allied ships during WWII. The German captain scuttles his ship to avoid defeat in this true story.

programme.title: The Boy In The Striped Pajamas
programme.desc: Through the innocent eyes of Bruno, the son of the commandant at a German concentration camp, a friendship with a Jewish boy on the other side of the fence has startling and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Eiffel
programme.desc: Having just finished the Statue of Liberty, Gustave Eiffel is at the peak of his career. Everything changes the day he crosses paths with his love and their forbidden relationship inspires him to change the Paris skyline forever.

programme.title: Hotel Salvation
programme.desc: Rajiv is forced to drop everything in order to accommodate his father's last and bizarre wish to travel to Varanasi to attain salvation. The trip that follows forces the duo to re-engage with each other and the world around them in this heart-warming comedy. Stars Adil Hussain and Lalit Behl.

programme.title: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: After a ten-day Hawaiian vacation, Joanna Drayton (Katharine Houghton) returns to her San Francisco home with John Prentice (Sidney Poitier), her brand-new fiance. Although he's a successful doctor, her parents, Christina (Katharine Hepburn) and Matthew (Spencer Tracy), are taken aback when they discover John is black. While he quickly wins over Christina with his charm and intelligence, Matthew is more hesitant. Nominated for ten Academy Awards in 1968. Directed by Stanley Kramer.

programme.title: Men In War
programme.desc: In Korea, on 6 September 1950, Lieutenant Benson's platoon finds itself isolated in enemy-held territory after a retreat. Soon they are joined by Sergeant Montana, whose overriding concern is caring for his catatonic colonel. Benson and Montana can't stand each other, but together they must get the survivors to Hill 465, where they hope the division is waiting. It's a long, harrowing march, fraught with all the dangers the elusive enemy can summon.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: The story of the first major battle of the American phase of the Vietnam War and the soldiers on both sides that fought it. Stars Mel Gibson, Madeleine Stowe and Greg Kinnear. (From Germany & USA, in English) (Movie) (War) (2002) (Rpt) MA CC

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: Set in Depression-era Franklin County, Virginia, a bootlegging gang is threatened by a new deputy and other authorities who want a cut of their profits. Directed by John Hillcoat, starring Jessica Chastain, Tom Hardy, Guy Pearce.

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: Set in Depression-era Franklin County, Virginia, a bootlegging gang is threatened by a new deputy and other authorities who want a cut of their profits. Directed by John Hillcoat, starring Jessica Chastain, Tom Hardy, Guy Pearce.

programme.title: Flags Of Our Fathers
programme.desc: Filmmaking legends Spielberg and Eastwood collaborate on a gripping portrayal of the WWII battle for Iwo Jima, focusing on the iconic flag-raising image and the tragic loss of life on both sides.

programme.title: First Snow Of Summer
programme.desc: Alexander vowed never to love - until he meets lively Caro in the Vienna subway. Their bittersweet journey tests his fears, changes seasons, and shows him love means risking it all.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Margaret and David review Who Framed Roger Rabbit, Eat the Rich and Bird. News on Paul Byrnes as Sydney Film Festival Director. Interviews with Zemeckis, Hoskins, Williams and Eastwood.

programme.desc: In Korea, on 6 September 1950, Lieutenant Benson's platoon finds itself isolated in enemy-held territory after a retreat. Soon they are joined by Sergeant Montana, whose overriding concern is caring for his catatonic colonel. Benson and Montana can't stand each other, but together they must get the survivors to Hill 465, where they hope the division is waiting. It's a long, harrowing march, fraught with all the dangers the elusive enemy can summon.

programme.title: Mass
programme.desc: Two couples meet for a painful and raw conversation in the aftermath of a violent tragedy. Directed and written by Fran Kranz, starring Jason Issacs, Martha Plimpton, Ann Dowd.

programme.title: Discovering Film: Whoopi Goldberg
programme.desc: Some of the biggest film stars in history rose to fame during the `golden age' of Hollywood, in the early and mid-20th century. We profile some of these stars who became household names.

programme.title: Marmalade
programme.desc: Baron strikes up a friendship with his new cellmate, a man with a history of prison breaks. As they hatch a plan to escape, Baron recalls how he met the love of his life and how they came up with a scheme to rob a bank.

programme.title: The Battle Of The River Plate
programme.desc: A gripping tale of heroism at sea, where the British Navy chases a German battleship sinking Allied ships during WWII. The German captain scuttles his ship to avoid defeat in this true story.

programme.title: Kaakkaa Muttai: The Crow's Egg
programme.desc: Follows the life of two boys, Periya (J. Vignesh) and his younger brother Chinna (Ramesh), who have grown up in a slum. With their father in jail, their mother brings them up alone. One day, Tamil star T.R. Silambarasan opens up a new pizza shop nearby, and the boys decide that by any means possible, they will gain entry into the upmarket pizza shop and buy a slice of pizza with their own money.

programme.title: The Skin Of Others
programme.desc: The Skin of Others is a story of modern Australia - its violent past and its future potential - told through the extraordinary life of Aboriginal World War One soldier Douglas Grant (c.1885-1951). Featuring acclaimed Indigenous actor Balang Tom E. Lewis in his final performance (as Douglas Grant) and guest appearances from Max Cullen and Archie Roach, this film movingly interweaves the lives of Grant and Lewis: two truly remarkable men.

programme.title: The Lighthorsemen
programme.desc: Four men of the Australian Light Horse Regiment are thrust into a cavalry charge when the British campaign in Palestine becomes stalemated in 1917. In a desperate attempt, 800 young Australian horsemen set off against gunfire and insurmountable odds to save the attacking British soldiers. Stars Peter Phelps, Nick Waters and Sigrid Thorton.

programme.title: Nymphomaniac Vol 2
programme.desc: Nymphomaniac Volume II continues with the story of self-diagnosed nymphomaniac Joe (Charlotte Gainsbourg) exploring her adulthood, during which her journey of self-discovery leads to darker complications. Volume II stars Jamie Bell, Willem Dafoe, Mia Goth and Jean-Marc Barr in addition to Stellan Skarsgard, Stacy Martin and Shia LaBeouf.

programme.title: Jamie At Home
programme.desc: Jamie collects the eggs that his healthy hens have laid and heads for the kitchen. He makes a delicious homemade egg tagliatelle and an omelette salad with bresaola.

programme.title: Secrets Of Spain
programme.desc: Gioconda and George Scott reveal unexpected of--the-beaten path locations for the best food experiences in southern Spain.

programme.title: Destination Flavour China Bitesize
programme.sub-title: Bamboo Shoots And Cured Ham Stir Fry
programme.desc: All the best moments and bits from Destination Flavour China, led by famed chef and author Adam Liaw.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Seafood Odyssey
programme.desc: Rick takes in the white sands and turquoise seas of Noosa, in Queensland, where he meets Sally Jenyns, a TV chef who shares Rick’s passion for the sea, boats and fishing. She also shows Rick a thing or two about seafood cooking Australian-style.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Seafood Odyssey
programme.desc: Rick begins the next leg of his Seafood Odyssey in Chesapeake Bay, Maryland, in America. The area is famous for striped bass and Rick makes a mouth-watering visit to an oyster shack.

programme.title: Come Dine With Me UK
programme.desc: Hoping to be a grand better off by the end of the week, is aspiring model Ryan. But will his French and Caribbean cuisine get tastebuds tingling or leave a nasty taste in the mouth?

programme.title: Come Dine With Me UK
programme.desc: It's night three in Leeds where medical trainer Jen is hosting a pink-themed party in an attempt to bag the big bucks.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Tonight's Easy Entertaining is a celebration of sauce, as Myra Karakelle from MLK Deli and chef Jean-Paul El Tom join Adam for a dressy dinner party.

programme.title: The Cook And The Chef
programme.desc: Simon revels in his favourite Thai food, and encourages heat- avoiding Maggie to 'dip a toe' into this chilli laden cuisine. The resulting savoury and sweet dishes are delicate, exquisitely complex and beautifully balanced in flavour, and surprisingly Maggie friendly.

programme.title: Paula Mcintyre's Hamely Kitchen
programme.desc: Paula will be making a Glens of Antrim lamb roast with a caramel and vinegar glaze and elevating the humble turnip by making two side dishes, cake and gratin.

programme.title: Lorraine's Fast, Fresh And Easy Food
programme.desc: Lorraine makes simple and classic recipes that have stood the test of time. From a twist on an Italian favourite, salmon saltimbocca with gremolata potatoes and crispy sage leaves to pan fried gnocci.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati has a traditional meal with Raramuri community leaders and visits a sustainable ranch.

programme.title: David Rocco's Italia
programme.desc: David explores the traditional roots of the Roman people, but he has to leave the city centre for that.

programme.title: Kriol Kitchen
programme.desc: Gubinge Jam with Bush Fig & Bush Fig Cup Cakes with a Bush Passion Fruit Icing: Ali & Mitch join their cousin Pat to learn how to whip up some sweet treats using local bush fruits found in the region.

programme.title: Marcus Wareing's Kitchen Garden Tales
programme.desc: Marcus rediscovers some wasabi plants in his kitchen garden and decides to find out more about them. Heading to a wasabi farm he learns all about how to grow this temperamental plant. The farm also produce watercress and he picks up some tips for this nutritious crop too.

programme.title: My Market Kitchen
programme.desc: Matt cooks a lemon ricotta tart overlooking Noosa Beach. Mike makes a bircher muesli in the market. Tobie Puttock matches Barossa wines with Sicilian meatballs alongside wine expert Adam Walls.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: When Lidia was in her 20's, she opened Buonavia, her first restaurant. With a menu that are favourites to her homeland; beef and potato goulash, crespelle with cherries, chocolate, and cream.

programme.title: Tastes And Traditions
programme.desc: In this episode of Tastes and Traditions, we celebrate the warmth and comfort of traditional Ukrainian home cooking.

programme.title: Jamie At Home
programme.desc: Jamie collects the eggs that his healthy hens have laid and heads for the kitchen. He makes a delicious homemade egg tagliatelle and an omelette salad with bresaola.

programme.title: Food Safari
programme.desc: You can smell the heady scents of saffron, paprika and garlic as host Maeve O'Meara investigates the key ingredients needed to create a Spanish pantry and visits chefs and home-cooks to gather some easy recipes. Learn about the art of Spanish tapas and join Carlos Lopez, a master of the no-fuss paella which he makes on the small balcony of his apartment.

programme.title: The Chocolate Queen
programme.desc: Get tangled in today's episode with Kirsten's creamy semifreddo paired with strawberries or keep it simple and treat yourself with lovely chocolate lollipops.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: Adam Liaw visit the Everyday Gourmet kitchen to cook up a bang bang chicken sald with a peppery kick and Justine serves up salmon with a yoghurt and walnut sauce.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Tonight's Easy Entertaining is a celebration of sauce, as Myra Karakelle from MLK Deli and chef Jean-Paul El Tom join Adam for a dressy dinner party.

programme.title: Secrets Of Spain
programme.desc: Gioconda and George Scott reveal unexpected of--the-beaten path locations for the best food experiences in southern Spain.

programme.title: Destination Flavour China Bitesize
programme.sub-title: Bamboo Shoots And Cured Ham Stir Fry
programme.desc: All the best moments and bits from Destination Flavour China, led by famed chef and author Adam Liaw.

programme.title: Paula Mcintyre's Hamely Kitchen
programme.desc: Paula will be cooking on the terrace-serving up locally-caught langoustines on a potato and smoked dulse wafer with pickled carrot. She will be making what she describes as 'love on a plate-a country pie made with locally bred ham served up with crowdie cheese and pickled smoked beetroot salad.

programme.title: Lorraine's Fast, Fresh And Easy Food
programme.desc: Baking isn't all about breads and cakes as Lorraine shows in tonight's episode.

programme.title: Destination Flavour
programme.desc: Hosts Adam Liaw, Renee Lim and Lily Serna meet passionate growers, celebrated chefs and local food heroes. In this episode, Renee meets legendary winemaker turned sheep farmer David Hohnen from the Margaret River region, Adam learns about the new craze for hot and cold smoking in Melbourne, while Lily catches up with leading providore Simon Johnson on Sydney's beautiful Hawkesbury River.

programme.title: David Rocco's Italia
programme.desc: Rome has always been a multicultural city, and that's apparent now more than ever. David meets with members of L'Orchestra di Piazza Vittorio, a band mostly made up of immigrants, who have achieved international success.

programme.title: Kriol Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Ali & Mitch Torres: Stinky Pearl Shell & Garlic Butter Pearl Meat
programme.desc: Ali and Mitch share two recipes they grew up with that their father used to make - a condiment made from the intestines of the pearl shell and also a dish made from the muscle of the shell.

programme.title: Marcus Wareing's Kitchen Garden Tales
programme.desc: Having cooked with salt marsh lamb for years, Marcus decides to venture out to the Romney Marshes to meet shepherd Chris and his flock. Here he learns what gives this lamb its delicate flavour.

programme.title: My Market Kitchen
programme.desc: Mike hits the road with David Mann for chicken kebabs with mojo rojo sauce. Chef Warren Mendez and Mandy Hall makes chilli hot sauce. Karen Chan prepares spicy sweet pulled pork.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia constantly cherishes the memory of baking bread with her Grandma Rosa. She makes onion tomato focaccia then talks about Taralli. She cooks pizza rolls with two unique Italian fillings.

programme.title: Tastes And Traditions
programme.desc: In this episode of Tastes and Traditions, we explore the rich flavors of Ukrainian home cooking, starting with Eggs in Spicy Sauce.

programme.title: Jamie At Home
programme.desc: Rhubarb is finally having a resurgence! This is good news for the UK as historically they grow some of the best rhubarb in the world.

programme.title: Food Safari
programme.desc: Maeve joins legendary restaurateur Tetsuya Wakuda, who gives tips on Japanese cooking and makes a simple marinade using just five ingredients, including his favourite miso paste. Top restaurateur Kimitata Azuma makes a fast and easy fresh tuna salad, and home-cook Yuki Totsuka shows how to make miso soup. Sushi master Shinji Tani reveals some of the secrets of his art. While knife expert Hideo Dekura slices sashimi.

programme.title: The Chocolate Queen
programme.desc: From elegant swans to delicate chocolate tubes, it's time for homemade desserts that are just as good as any fine dining establishment.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: Justine makes a staple vegetable super fun with her broccoli topped with grated hard ricotta and shows you some mini mozazarella and salami pizza pockets.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Stop right now, thank you very much, and take a trip to spice world with Adam and his guests, comedian Tegan Higginbotham and chef Tom Sarafian.

programme.title: Instant Italian
programme.desc: Anna shows how to take pizza dough to a whole new level with her recipes for Pizza Montanare, a fried pizza, and Bubble Bread, a crisp dough with a cheesy center.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Usa
programme.desc: Bill and Paul arrive in Central, Arkansas on the opening day of frog gigging season. They learn how to spear bullfrogs with a stick and cook them up on the side of the river banks. They also learn the secret to a famous BBQ sauce and in the end, they throw down with a group of Dutch Oven fanatics called The Redneck Gourmets.

programme.title: Jamie's Super Food
programme.desc: Jamie's in the Nicoyan Peninsula in Costa Rica, where he joins fisherman Otto for a meal of freshly caught fish with family and friends on the beach.

programme.title: Please Eat Slowly Bitesize
programme.desc: Learn how to make mouth-watering Yee Sang. Victor has a few tricks for slicing the perfect julienne at home, as well as some presentation tips to make your salad a showstopper.

programme.title: Come Dine With Me UK
programme.desc: It's night four and a Middle Eastern mezze is on the menu for freelance creative Philip.

programme.title: Come Dine With Me UK
programme.desc: It's the final night in Leeds and hair salon owner Sarah hopes to delight her diners with some classic eighties nosh.

programme.desc: Stop right now, thank you very much, and take a trip to spice world with Adam and his guests, comedian Tegan Higginbotham and chef Tom Sarafian.

programme.desc: Bush tucker has come a long way since the 1980s when a few bushfood pioneers discovered that this country is jam packed with fantastic native wild foods. programme.desc: Having cooked with salt marsh lamb for years, Marcus decides to venture out to the Romney Marshes to meet shepherd Chris and his flock. Here he learns what gives this lamb its delicate flavour.

programme.title: My Market Kitchen
programme.desc: Mike hits the road with David Mann for chicken kebabs with mojo rojo sauce. Chef Warren Mendez and Mandy Hall makes chilli hot sauce. Karen Chan prepares spicy sweet pulled pork.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Fantastic Feasts
programme.desc: Dame Mary Berry knows a thing or two about cooking up a Festive Feast, and this year she's sharing her cooking skills with novice cooks, cousins James, Jack and Leah, who want to throw a great feast.

programme.title: Inside Iceland: A Budget Supermarket
programme.desc: Christmas is the biggest time of year for all retailers, but especially for Britain's ultra-competitive supermarkets. They have to think about Christmas for at least ten months a year, says Iceland's Head Development Chef.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Cooks Britain
programme.sub-title: East Of Scotland - Haddock And Carrots
programme.desc: Tom Kerridge heads to the East Coast of Scotland in his 1950s food truck to discover what it takes to produce the food on our plate and to cook with the British ingredients he finds along the way.

programme.title: Nadiya's Family Favourites
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain creates tasty dishes for manic weekdays, visits the world's first cereal cafe in London, and rolls the dough with baker Heather at her Bread Baking Club.

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: This week Jamie heads off the beaten track to the breath-taking but little known Basilicata in search of some seriously old school Italian recipes.

programme.title: Tour De Fred: Northern Ireland
programme.desc: Fred's cycle on the North Coast takes him through dramatic cliffs and rolling hills. He tries golf and also gets a lesson in hurling, the fastest field sport in the world.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: Rick Stein journeys across the beautiful Mediterranean, visiting islands and places that radiate a vibrant sense of individuality through their spirit, history and food. His escape begins in Marseille, where he catches a ferry to Bastia, the ancient capital of Corsica, and is invited to a typical Corsican feast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony gives us an intimate tour of the New York City foods he loves - sturgeon and bagels, fluke ceviche, braised veal cheek, authentic cheese and, of course, a hotdog.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Marooned in San Francisco, Tony tastes local shellfish and durian ice cream before embarking on a pilgrimage to experience the genius of Thomas Keller, chef, and owner of The French Laundry.

programme.title: Big Zuu And Aj Tracey: Rich Flavours
programme.desc: Zuu & AJ hit the Highlands to taste the World's most expensive haggis. Meeting Scottish nobility, they carriage drive & fly fish, before cooking up a spicy feast for Scottish food royalty.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Cooks Britain
programme.sub-title: East Of Scotland - Haddock And Carrots
programme.desc: Tom Kerridge heads to the East Coast of Scotland in his 1950s food truck to discover what it takes to produce the food on our plate and to cook with the British ingredients he finds along the way.

programme.title: Bonn
programme.desc: Otto John charges Toni with finding out who is supporting Scipio financially. She finds what she is looking for in her father's office and comes across dubious payments. When trucks in the supply yard are being loaded with the mysterious crates, Toni keeps a very close watch. In an unobserved moment she jumps inside one. But where are they going?

programme.title: Bonn
programme.desc: John presents his Scipio investigation to the interior minister, hoping to save his career. John seeks to expose Gehlen's group but nobody believes him.

programme.title: Beyond Signs
programme.desc: The police find burned pieces of Lily's dress, similar to what Diego revealed; Diego suffers from village gossip and his friends exclude him from the group.

programme.title: Mastermind
programme.desc: Mastermind is the legendary quiz that sets the toughest questions on television. Join Mastermind quizmaster Marc Fennell, as each night he puts four contenders to the test.

programme.title: Mastermind
programme.desc: Mastermind is the legendary quiz that sets the toughest questions on television. Join Mastermind quizmaster Marc Fennell, as each night he puts four contenders to the test.

programme.title: The Zelensky Story
programme.desc: With unique access to Volodymyr Zelensky and Olena Zelenska, this is the extraordinary journey of a comedian who played the president in a TV show and then became the real president of his country.

programme.title: Destination Flavour China Bitesize
programme.desc: All the best moments and bits from Destination Flavour China, led by famed chef and author Adam Liaw.

programme.title: Nhk World English News Morning
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: Anc Philippines The World Tonight
programme.desc: Multi-award winning newscast on ABS-CBN and ANC, The World Tonight delivers the top stories of the day, covering political, economic, and social sectors on both local and global fronts.

programme.title: Dw English News
programme.desc: News and analysis of the top international and European news and current affairs from Berlin, in English.

programme.title: Al Jazeera News
programme.desc: News via satellite from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Qatar, in English.

programme.title: BBC News At Six
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.sub-title: France 24 English News Morning First Edition
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: Dd India News Hour
programme.desc: The most recent political, sports, entertainment and socio-economic updates across India and the world from New Delhi, in English.

programme.title: Matched
programme.sub-title: Virginia And Lopeti + Manpreet And Manpreet
programme.desc: Princess Virginia prepares to marry Lopeti in the grandest Tongan wedding ever to be held in New Zealand but how will Her Royal Highness cope with marriage when she has never cooked or cleaned in her life? And Kiwi-Sikh Manpreet travels back to India for his arranged wedding to a woman with his same name but will they have anything else in common?

programme.title: Spectacular Railways Of The Swiss Alps
programme.desc: The Rigi is home to the most remarkable collection of historic mountain railways in Switzerland, led by the Rigi Railway, the first cogwheel train ever built in Europe. A journey aboard the legendary Sachsi railcar is a step back in time, winding past waterfalls, rugged rock faces and soaring viaducts, to the delight of passengers and railway enthusiasts alike. Some traditions are worth preserving.

programme.title: Scottish Vets Down Under
programme.desc: At Bendigo Animal Hospital, Dr Chris faces one of his most unusual cases yet when a pregnant carpet python needs urgent intervention. It's a painstaking procedure with little room for error. At the equine hospital, Dr Mike and Dr Sarah each deal with horses showing signs of lameness, but what appears routine quickly becomes far more serious, putting both surgical skill and nerves firmly to the test.

programme.title: Scottish Vets Down Under
programme.desc: It's a busy day in Bendigo. At the equine hospital, a horse arrives with a worrying knee injury before a critically ill newborn foal is rushed in, pushing the team to their limits. At the animal hospital, Dr Chris treats a possum struggling to recover, then heads out during peak kitten season. Back at the equine hospital, the battle to save the foal and reunite it with its mother is just beginning.

programme.title: BBC News At Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 International Sbs Midday
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS Newshour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news, presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programme.title: Rhoda Roberts Ao: A Lasting Legacy
programme.desc: Rhoda Roberts helped shape the Garma Festival with Yolnu leaders. This program showcases the strength of Yolngu culture through Bunggul - storytelling, dance and deep connection to Country at Gulkula.

programme.title: Nitv News: Nula
programme.desc: The latest news from the oldest living culture, join Natalie Ahmat and the team of NITV journalists for stories from an Indigenous perspective.

programme.title: Point: Road To Referendum History Bites
programme.desc: Gomeroi man Uncle Wayne Nean reflects on the day he met a remarkable group of students who had driven to regional NSW to stand up to racism: The Freedom Riders.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Find out what Adam, chef turned butcher Darren O'Rourke and accountant turned burger king Ali 'Chebbo' Chebbani do with the classic meat and three veg combo.

programme.title: Sri Lanka With Alexander Armstrong
programme.sub-title: Sri Lanka With Alexander Armstrong Series 1 Ep 3
programme.desc: Alexander meets a snake expert called Sampath who is always on call to rescue the deadly but endangered reptiles. After a meeting with a well-known Sri Lankan travel writer, Shenelle, at the beautiful coast near Galle, he drives to the far north of the country to the scene of a bitter civil war which raged for thirty years.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed, and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Letters And Numbers
programme.desc: Two contestants pit their linguistic and numerical skills against each other and the clock in this entertaining quiz show. Join host Richard Morecroft along with maths whiz Lily Serna and wordsmith David Astle.

programme.title: Mastermind
programme.desc: Our weekly family winners are back with two minutes of general knowledge, plus the dreaded slow burn round. Tonight's slow burn topics are a Popstar, a Toy, a Year and an Historical Event.

programme.title: SBS World News
programme.desc: Latest reports and analysis of major national and international news of the day from Australia's only world news service.

programme.title: Going Places With Ernie Dingo
programme.desc: Ernie returns to the Great Barrier Reef to meet the young mob helping to restore it and goes croc-spotting on the Daintree River. Brooke walks the coast to catch a feed of mud crab.

programme.title: A New Anzac
programme.desc: Three Months of preparation lead up to the first Remembrance Day ceremony held on the new Parade Ground, with the prestigious Victoria Cross being awarded to Private Richard Leslie Norden. Objects big and small are prepped for the new Anzac Hall, including the FA-18 Hornet, the never before displayed German V2 rocket, and a collection of over 80 new mannequins. The architectural wonder of the Rising Sun copper roof comes together as the team work towards their end of year deadline.

programme.title: Orient Express: A Golden Era Of Travel
programme.desc: In the Golden Age of Rail, passengers could buy a ticket from London to Istanbul on the Orient Express network. Travelling east through Austria, they might stop in its capital to meet the father of psychoanalysis, whose own flight to freedom is forever linked to the legendary train. Then on to the City of Spas, home to one of the world's longest and fastest tram lines, run entirely by children.

programme.title: SBS World News Late
programme.desc: Latest reports and analysis of major national and international news of the day from Australia's only world news service.

programme.title: The King
programme.desc: Bruno infiltrates Farid into the Muslim community led by the charismatic imam Amir. Sonia, a young prison officer, always critical of Bruno’s methods, becomes the new commander: the clean face of San Michele to show to Lombardo. With the death of Lackovic, the junky inmates start going into cold turkey: a feud begins between the Slavs and Nigerians to control the drug trafficking.

programme.title: Babylon Berlin
programme.desc: As an SA squad marches through town, Charlotte is called to a crime scene, Nyssen throws a huge party with Helga and makes an important announcement.

programme.title: Babylon Berlin

programme.title: Nordland 99
programme.desc: Neither Emma nor Christian can get hold of Lukas, and they must form an unexpected alliance to find him. At the same time, Lukas tries to find a way out of the darkness that surrounds him.

programme.title: Mastermind

programme.title: The Zelensky Story
programme.desc: Fiction becomes reality as Zelensky is confirmed as president. His infamous phone call with Trump and his only meeting with Putin are a brutal initiation into the ruthless world of power-politics. Zelensky then faces the growing threat of a Russian invasion, culminating in Putin’s decision to send in the Russian military. Zelensky must decide whether to stay and lead the fight.

programme.title: The Bee Whisperer
programme.desc: Charlie is a pro when it comes to bee removal. But the one technique he can never seem to nail down is the "forced abscond". To level up his forced abscond game, Charlie heads to Brenham, Texas to meet with the "Texas Friendly Beekeeper" and forced abscond master. Charlie then meets with Korhan Kaftanoglu from Apimaye - a company that specialises in a new type of insulated bee hive.

programme.title: Wales: Land Of The Wild
programme.desc: It's the middle of spring and the brightest time of year in Wales. This should be the best of times for wildlife, but the race to breed is on and predators are on the hunt.

programme.title: The Rover Of Tobruk
programme.desc: The Rover of Tobruk is a compelling documentary that examines the amazing life story of WW2 Military Medal recipient and two times Magarey Medallist and Port Adelaide Football Club immortal Bob Quinn.

programme.title: Fallen: A Tragic Story Of The Unnamed
programme.desc: This story tells the heartbreaking story of Norman Gibbins. Despite facing challenges and strained relationships, Norman enlisted and rose through the ranks. He fought in Gallipoli, where he exhibited bravery and leadership. However, he tragically lost his life at the Battle of Fromelles. The aftermath of the battle caused deep grief and conflict within Norman's family, particularly affecting his sister Violet. Nevertheless, his heroism and leadership will never be forgotten. It is a moving picture of the grief that over 60,000 families experienced as a result of the deaths of their loved ones during WW1.

programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: Amstel Gold Women's Race 2026

programme.title: Marathon De Paris 2026

programme.title: Surviving Ww2
programme.desc: Air warfare was pivotal yet perilous in WW2. Eric Brown, history's most prolific test pilot, recalls the deadly arms race to match Germany's superior technology. Dambuster George Johnson recounts dropping the bouncing bomb on a German dam. Glider pilot Laurie Weeden flew into Normandy the night before D-Day, whilst USAF pilot Huie Lamb survived ditching his P-51 Mustang in the English Channel.

programme.title: Jewels Of The Mediterranean
programme.desc: In this episode, we visit Menorca, the most easterly point of Spain. Luxury boat business Pedro's Boats gives an insight into life and business on the isle, a British couple show us their local fiesta, and we explore Lithica, a very unique arts venue.

programme.title: Magical Train Journeys In Switzerland
programme.sub-title: From The Three-lakes Region Through Lavaux To Geneva

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Figuring out the best way to be both a high school Freshman and a brand new super hero has always been a bit of a balancing act for Danny.

programme.title: Rocket Power
programme.desc: Reggie meets her role model, Missy The Missile Giove, a snow-bike racer with a piranha for luck. // Otto pulls a fire alarm, and Lars gets blamed-will Otto and Twister own up to it?

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.sub-title: Day In The Life Of A Classroom / Big Bob's Crisis, A
programme.desc: Mr. Simmons wins the Teacher Of The Year Award and a TV channel wants to do a documentary on him. / Big Bob has a change of heart when he has what appears to be a heart attack.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo is investigating sightings of UFO's in the country town, High Falls. The locals down at a coffee shop explain the details but, Leonardo doesn't believe it until he is kidnapped by one of them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Spongebob Squarepants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: Kamp Koral: Spongebob's Under Years
programme.sub-title: Hats Off To Space / In A Nut's Shell
programme.desc: The Dinghies travel to outer space. // After discovering his empty shell, Narlene and Nobby disguise themselves at Camp Master Krabs.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help their friend Catalina the Condor become an amazing Gaucha and save the Gaucho Games! Dora and Boots meet Pilar the Princess Unicorn and help her get back to Unicorn Land!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: There are lots of different kinds of trucks, but only one that can turn into a giant robot - Humunga-Truck! The Bubble Guppies learn about different kinds of trucks on their way to the big Truck Show!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Uh oh - Gil lost his library card while returning his favourite books to the library! Gil and his Guppy friends will have to dive into all of Gil's favourite books to find it again.

programme.title: Baby Shark's Big Show
programme.desc: Inspired by their favorite TV show, She-Shark, Baby Shark and William set out to be superheroes. / After making up a lie to sound brave, William is forced to face his fears.

programme.title: Garden Academy
programme.desc: Sofi wakes up in the middle of the night because she had a nightmare. Lara and Margarita help her understand that it is only her story in her imagination, nothing bad will happen to her.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups In A Jam / Pups Save A Windsurfing Pig
programme.desc: It's the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants! Zuma goes on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig decides to go for a misguided ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save A Dragon / Pups Save The Three Little Pigs
programme.desc: A fantasy fire breathing dragon comes to life and won't let Ryder and pups into the Lookout! The Paw Patrol help three little pigs build new houses after theirs' mysteriously disappear.

programme.title: Blaze And The Monster Machines
programme.desc: NASA's Commander Megan is back! And she's taking Blaze and his friends to... Mars!

programme.title: Blaze And The Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends have renewable energy engines! And when the Gas Guzzler steals everyone's gas, they'll have to use renewable energy to finish the race!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save A Runaway Rooster/pups Save A Snowbound Cow
programme.desc: Chickaletta & Roosterio run away from a chicken show and get stuck on a runaway drone.// Bettina wanders up Jake's mountain and gets caught in a snowstorm will the Paw Patrol to bring her down safely.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save A Sweet Mayor/pups Save A Magic Trick
programme.desc: Humdinger is carried away by hungry raccoons and ends up floating in Adventure Bay with a curious dolphin. // A magic trick goes awry, the Adventure Bay Easter Festival is overrun by wild bunnies.

programme.title: Rubble And Crew
programme.sub-title: Crew Builds A Drive-in Movie Theater / The Crew Finds A Rainbow Treasure, The
programme.desc: Mix & Motor's favourite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove // Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is teamwork!

programme.title: Baby Shark's Big Show
programme.desc: After finding a map to the Legendary Loot, the Shark family splits up to hunt the treasure down. / Baby convinces Daddy to say 'yup' to everything for a day. What's the worst that could happen?

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.sub-title: Dj Catnip Gets His Groove Back
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats must help DJ Catnip get his groove back.

programme.title: The Tiny Chef Show
programme.desc: Henry's in a Snail Race, but Chef's fruit chews won't set in time! / Chef bakes an Opera cake for Ruby while Olly noisily builds a concert stage.

programme.title: Dora
programme.sub-title: Side-swiped / Quest For The Blue Bananas
programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear. Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: If Molly's new friend Sandy doesn't finish her work on time, she might not be crowned Queen of the Beach at the Big Beach Ball! She needs help from some hard-working Guppies to win that crown!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Bubble Brothers Circus is coming to town, and all the Guppies are getting into the act! See Goby the clown, Gil the acrobat, Oona the lion tamer... just watch out for that pie! SPLAT!

programme.title: Garden Academy
programme.desc: It is the 100th birthday of the Tree of Knowledge. And the boys want to throw her a surprise party. Lara with the help of Gardener Tim, teaches them step by step how to organise the party.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save A Runaway Rooster/pups Save A Snowbound Cow
programme.desc: Chickaletta & Roosterio run away from a chicken show and get stuck on a runaway drone.// Bettina wanders up Jake's mountain and gets caught in a snowstorm will the Paw Patrol to bring her down safely.

programme.title: Blaze And The Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Blaze's friends come down with a case of the Sneezles, he, AJ and Gabby have to hurry back to the Monster Dome from the wilderness so they can give their friends some medicine oil to cure them.
